name: LSF Submit Job
summary: Generate safe IBM LSF bsub scripts for common HPC job shapes.
description: This skill helps users create IBM Spectrum LSF bsub scripts for CPU, MPI, GPU, and short smoke-test workloads with conservative defaults, clear placeholders, and notes about queue, project, resource string, and site-specific launch syntax.

tools.name: mpirun
tools.notes: MPI launch command and hostfile integration vary by site; some LSF systems provide jsrun, mpiexec, or wrappers.

inputs.name: project
inputs.description: Site-specific project, account, or application profile string used by local LSF policy.

inputs.name: resources
inputs.description: Requested cores, hosts, memory, GPUs, wall time, resource string, and output paths.

outputs.name: lsf_script
outputs.description: An LSF bsub script that can be adapted and submitted after site review.

outputs.name: job_id
outputs.description: The job id printed by bsub after submission.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced artifacts.
Check the CPU script shell syntax.
Run bsub with a short wall time on a test queue after replacing placeholders and confirming local queue, project, GPU, and resource-string policy.

references.title: IBM Spectrum LSF clusters, jobs, and queues
